dashboard.label: LLM Monitor - Ollama & GPU Dashboard
dashboard.description: Real-time monitoring of Ollama LLM server and GPU resources

panel.html:
<style>
          /* --- Global background ------------------------------------ */
          body,
          .dashboard-body,
          .fieldset,
          .dashboard-view-controls,
          .edit-dashboard-btn-group { background: #060f1e !important; }

          /* --- Dashboard title -------------------------------------- */
          .dashboard-title {
            color: #00e5ff !important;
            font-size: 22px !important;
            font-weight: 700 !important;
            letter-spacing: 2px !important;
            text-shadow: 0 0 18px rgba(0,229,255,0.7) !important;
          }
          .dashboard-description { color: #48cae4 !important; }

          /* --- Panel body ------------------------------------------ */
          .dashboard-cell .panel-body {
            background: #0b1f35 !important;
            border: 1px solid #1a4a6e !important;
            border-radius: 6px !important;
            box-shadow: 0 0 16px rgba(0,180,216,0.18),
                        inset 0 1px 0 rgba(0,229,255,0.06) !important;
          }
          /* --- Panel title header ---------------------------------- */
          .panel-head {
            background: #081526 !important;
            border-bottom: 1px solid #1a4a6e !important;
            border-radius: 6px 6px 0 0 !important;
          }
          .panel-head h3 {
            color: #48cae4 !important;
            font-size: 10px !important;
            font-weight: 700 !important;
            letter-spacing: 2px !important;
            text-transform: uppercase !important;
          }

          /* --- Single value ---------------------------------------- */
          .single-result {
            color: #00e5ff !important;
            text-shadow: 0 0 12px rgba(0,229,255,0.55) !important;
          }
          .single-unit, .single-label { color: #90e0ef !important; }

          /* --- Tables ---------------------------------------------- */
          .table-chrome thead th,
          .table-chrome th {
            background: #081526 !important;
            color: #48cae4 !important;
            border-bottom: 1px solid #1a4a6e !important;
            font-size: 10px !important;
            letter-spacing: 1.5px !important;
            text-transform: uppercase !important;
          }
          .table-chrome tbody td { color: #caf0f8 !important; border-color: #122a42 !important; }
          .table-chrome tbody tr:nth-child(odd)  { background: rgba(0,180,216,0.04) !important; }
          .table-chrome tbody tr:hover           { background: rgba(0,229,255,0.09) !important; }

          /* --- Chart internals ------------------------------------- */
          .highcharts-background { fill: #0b1f35 !important; }
          .highcharts-grid-line  { stroke: #1a4a6e !important; opacity:0.6 !important; }
          .highcharts-axis-labels text,
          .highcharts-axis text  { fill: #90e0ef !important; }
          .highcharts-legend-item text { fill: #caf0f8 !important; }
          .highcharts-title { fill: #00e5ff !important; }

          /* --- Section header ---------------------------------- */
          .llm-section {
            padding: 4px 12px;
            background: linear-gradient(90deg, #0d2a40 0%, transparent 100%);
            border-left: 3px solid #00b4d8;
            color: #48cae4;
            font-size: 11px;
            font-weight: 700;
            letter-spacing: 3px;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            margin: 0;
            line-height: 28px;
          }

          /* --- Offload warning row ----------------------------- */
          .offload-yes { color: #f8be34 !important; font-weight:700; }
          .offload-no  { color: #53a051 !important; }
        </style>

search.query: index=llm_monitor metric_type=ollama | head 1 | eval v=upper(status) | table v
index=llm_monitor metric_type=ollama | head 1 | table version
index=llm_monitor metric_type=ollama | head 1 | table model_count
index=llm_monitor metric_type=ollama | head 1 | table running_model_count
index=llm_monitor metric_type=ollama | head 1 | eval v=if(any_offloaded_to_ram="True","YES","NO") | table v
index=llm_monitor metric_type=gpu | head 1 | table gpu_count
index=llm_monitor metric_type=gpu | head 1 | eval v=round(used_vram_mb/total_vram_mb*100,1) | table v
index=llm_monitor metric_type=gpu | head 1 | eval v=round(used_vram_mb/1024,1) | table v
index=llm_monitor metric_type=gpu | head 1 | eval v=round(free_vram_mb/1024,1) | table v
index=llm_monitor metric_type=gpu | head 1 | eval v=round(total_vram_mb/1024,1) | table v
index=llm_monitor metric_type=gpu | head 1 | spath output=g path="gpus{}" | mvexpand g | spath input=g | stats avg(gpu_utilization_pct) as v | eval v=round(v,1) | table v
index=llm_monitor metric_type=gpu | head 1 | spath output=g path="gpus{}" | mvexpand g | spath input=g | stats avg(temperature_c) as v | eval v=round(v,1) | table v
index=llm_monitor metric_type=gpu | head 1 | spath output=g path="gpus{}" | mvexpand g | spath input=g | stats avg(power_draw_w) as v | eval v=round(v,1) | table v
index=llm_monitor metric_type=gpu | spath output=g path="gpus{}" | mvexpand g | spath input=g | timechart avg(gpu_utilization_pct) by name span=1m
index=llm_monitor metric_type=gpu | spath output=g path="gpus{}" | mvexpand g | spath input=g | timechart avg(temperature_c) by name span=1m
index=llm_monitor metric_type=gpu | eval used=round(used_vram_mb/1024,2) | eval total=round(total_vram_mb/1024,2) | timechart avg(used) as "Used VRAM (GB)", avg(total) as "Total VRAM (GB)" span=1m
index=llm_monitor metric_type=gpu | spath output=g path="gpus{}" | mvexpand g | spath input=g | timechart avg(power_draw_w) by name span=1m

index=llm_monitor metric_type=ollama running_model_count>0 | head 20 | spath output=rm path="running_models{}" | mvexpand rm | spath input=rm | chart avg(size_vram_gb) as "VRAM (GB)", avg(size_ram_gb) as "RAM Offload (GB)" by name
index=llm_monitor metric_type=gpu | eval vram_pct=round(used_vram_mb/total_vram_mb*100,1) | timechart avg(vram_pct) as "VRAM Usage (%)" span=1m

index=llm_monitor metric_type=gpu | head 1 | spath output=g path="gpus{}" | mvexpand g | spath input=g | eval vram_label=memory_used_mb." / ".memory_total_mb." MB (".round(memory_used_mb/memory_total_mb*100,1)."%)" | table name, vendor, temperature_c, gpu_utilization_pct, vram_label, power_draw_w, clock_graphics_mhz, performance_state | rename name AS "GPU Name", vendor AS Vendor, temperature_c AS "Temp °C", gpu_utilization_pct AS "Util %", vram_label AS "VRAM Used", power_draw_w AS "Power W", clock_graphics_mhz AS "Clock MHz", performance_state AS "P-State"

index=llm_monitor metric_type=ollama | head 1 | spath output=rm path="running_models{}" | mvexpand rm | spath input=rm | eval ram_offload=if(offloaded_to_ram="true" OR offloaded_to_ram="True", "YES "+size_ram_gb+" GB", "—") | table name, size_vram_gb, size_ram_gb, size_total_gb, ram_offload, expires_at | rename name AS Model, size_vram_gb AS "VRAM (GB)", size_ram_gb AS "RAM (GB)", size_total_gb AS "Total (GB)", ram_offload AS "RAM Offload", expires_at AS "Expires At"

index=llm_monitor metric_type=ollama | head 1 | spath output=m path="models{}" | mvexpand m | spath input=m | table name, family, parameter_size, quantization, size_gb, modified_at | rename name AS Model, family AS Family, parameter_size AS Parameters, quantization AS Quantization, size_gb AS "Size (GB)", modified_at AS "Last Modified"
